dict.string: Narrator needs access to your Documents folder to load videos you select for narration.
Narrator needs access to your Desktop to load videos you select for narration.
Narrator needs access to your Downloads folder to load and save videos and exports.
Narrator needs access to external drives to load videos you select for narration.
Narrator needs access to network volumes to load videos you select for narration.
Narrator needs the microphone to record narration audio alongside the screen.
Narrator does not use the camera. This entry is required because some macOS APIs probe for camera availability.
Narrator needs Screen Recording permission to capture your screen for narration.
Narrator uses Apple Events to invoke the built-in text-to-speech engine.
